name: Leapsome People Enablement API
what_it_does: Leapsome REST API for people enablement platform combining performance reviews, OKRs, engagement surveys, learning, and 1:1s. Enables AI agents to query review cycles, retrieve OKR data, access engagement survey results, and integrate people development data into HR workflows. Leapsome is popular in European tech companies.
use_cases: Querying performance review cycles and competency assessment data from HR analytics agents
Retrieving OKR progress and goal alignment from leadership reporting agents
Accessing engagement survey results and action items from HRBP workflow agents
Integrating learning module completion data into development tracking agents
not_for: Payroll or HRIS record keeping (Leapsome is performance and development focused)
Companies without structured performance management processes
best_when: An HR team using Leapsome wants AI agents to aggregate people development data, track review cycle progress, and surface OKR and engagement insights for leadership and HRBP workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: 360 feedback and performance review data is extremely sensitive. Individual data requires strict access controls and should not be exposed to unauthorized agents.

auth.notes: Leapsome API token authentication. Contact Leapsome for API access — not self-serve. Account-scoped tokens.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per employee annual pricing; modular (Reviews, Goals, Surveys, Learning)
pricing.notes: European people platform with enterprise pricing. API access not self-serve — requires Leapsome agreement.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: 360 feedback and performance data is extremely sensitive employee data
No public MCP server — REST API requires Leapsome agreement for access
API access is not self-serve — must contact Leapsome for API credentials
EU data residency by default — verify GDPR compliance for cross-border data
Limited public API documentation — developer access is restricted
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: 360 feedback, performance reviews, and employee development data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency. API access requires agreement.

security_score_components.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee 360 feedback and performance data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency default. Restricted API access.
